        )
        (input_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
        (post_attention_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
      )
    )
    (25): FSDPCheckpointWrapper(
      (_checkpoint_wrapped_module): DenseDecoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiHeadAttention(
          (q_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=True)
          (k_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (v_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (o_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (mlp): DenseMLP(
          (gate_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (up_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (down_proj): _Linear(in_features=18944, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (input_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
        (post_attention_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
      )
    )
    (26): FSDPCheckpointWrapper(
      (_checkpoint_wrapped_module): DenseDecoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiHeadAttention(
          (q_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=True)
          (k_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (v_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (o_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (mlp): DenseMLP(
          (gate_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (up_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (down_proj): _Linear(in_features=18944, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (input_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
        (post_attention_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
      )
    )
    (27): FSDPCheckpointWrapper(
      (_checkpoint_wrapped_module): DenseDecoderLayer(
        (self_attn): MultiHeadAttention(
          (q_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=True)
          (k_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (v_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=512, bias=True)
          (o_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (mlp): DenseMLP(
          (gate_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (up_proj): _Linear(in_features=3584, out_features=18944, bias=False)
          (down_proj): _Linear(in_features=18944, out_features=3584, bias=False)
        )
        (input_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
        (post_attention_layernorm): RMSNorm((3584,), eps=1e-06)
      )
    )
  )
  (rotary_emb): RotaryEmbedding()
  (embed_tokens): FSDPEmbedding(152064, 3584)
)
